# Data Model Checklist: Search by Address in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover search input, suggestions, and geocode results.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/024-address-map-search/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Search input captures query text and submission metadata.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Suggestion entries capture display text, rank, and confidence.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Geocode results capture canonical address, coordinates, and coverage status.

## UX State

- [x] CHK-DM-004 Map state captures center, zoom, and marker state changes.
